results.rendered_html:
spardhin a. (nī f.)
1 Rivalling, emulating, competing, vying with; tavādharaspardhiṣu vidrumeṣu  R. 13. 13 , 16. 62. 
2 Emulous, envious.
3 Proud.
— m. A competitor, an equal.
